flag:bridge-fixed.description: Woodcutter has repaired the river bridge at overworld tile [32,28].

flag:has-dungeon-key.description: Player holds the brass dungeon key dropped by the Desert Wyrm; unlocks the castle gate.

flag:morning-errands-done.description: Page Pip's morning errand has been carried from the village green to the shop and back.

flag:oldwood-oath-sworn.description: The Oldwood Hermit's road oath has been carried past the first forest raiders.

flag:lost-page-guided.description: Lost Page Rowan has been guided from the Deep Forest oak back toward the old road.

flag:shop-sample-claimed.description: Hearthwake shopkeeper has already given the player the one-time travel cake sample.
